1.title: Meet the Brand Activators
1.subtitle: Grupo Lumina Portfolio Play
1.footer: Now, explore the process that led us to the category territories.
p: In 2023 Bendito and Grupo Lumina team gathered together to define the role of brands in the Company.

We strategically organized the brand portfolio so that each brand can address opportunities across different categories in the market, with a future-ready perspective, without cannibalizing each other.
The Grupo Lumina Territory Map is guided by the Brand Activators, which are the main purchase motivations related to the category.

Having the Category Value Drivers as our starting point, we analyzed several reports from Grupo Lumina in order to find patterns among them that could led us to the main brand activators in the category.
We concluded that, despite the different perspectives, the lenses had many points of convergence.
And that, regardless of the driver, value is a baseline expectation among Retail Competitors.
No matter if it's a budget brand or a premium brand. The consumer promise must be delivered.
So, if value is a foundational force of the Retail Category, it must also be central to our Territory Map.
The center of the map is the gravitational core and represents the highest level of specialization and consumer relevance within each territory.

Combining the category learnings, the intersections and the opportunities that had not yet been addressed, we created the Brand Activators Territory Map, based on the CVDs, aimed at managing both the current and future portfolio.

1.title: How to read this?
1.p: There are 7 Macro-Territories and 10 Brand Activators of the category

2.title: Macro-Territories
2.p: The CVDs give rise to the macro-territories and serve as compasses.

3.title: Brand Activators (Territories)
3.p: Each macro-territory contains one or more Brand Activators — characteristics that define territories beyond the functional aspects of the category, addressing pain points, brand strength, trends, and the emotions connected to shopping.

4.title: Tiers
4.p: Brands from different tiers can coexist within the same Brand Activator.
4.floating: The closer to the center, the greater the performance or the more specialized it is.

5.title: Products and Brands
5.p:
Products and Brands can be placed in the Brand Activator Territory Map.
Be sure you fill the right spaces when you enter a new product or brand.

home.title: Welcome to Bendito Branding Tools
p: This tool was created to organize the Grupo Lumina's Brand Portfolio Play, which aims to define the role of brands in the Company and strategically organize the brand portfolio so that each brand can address opportunities across different categories in the market, with a future-ready perspective.
The Territory Map is a portfolio management tool that can and should be revisited according to new market movements and trends.
There is no right or wrong map. There is the one that makes the most sense for each company, in a specific category, within a given context.

mt-1.title: Activates the desire for value and savings
mt-1.desc: By offering the best price-to-quality ratio and rewarding smart shopping choices

mt-2.title: Free of harmful ingredients
mt-2.desc: Organic, natural and certified products that put consumer health first

mt-3.title: Focus on superior quality and freshness
mt-3.desc: Premium sourcing, artisanal production and exceptional taste that elevate everyday consumption

mt-4.title: Prioritize practical and time-saving solutions
mt-4.desc: Easy preparation, convenient formats and seamless purchasing that fit the modern consumer's pace

mt-5.title: Sustainable and responsible
mt-5.desc: Environmental awareness and positive impact on communities and the planet

mt-6.title: Safe and consistently trusted
mt-6.desc: Certified quality, transparent labeling and reliable availability that families can count on

mt-7.title: Premium sensorial experiences
mt-7.desc: Inspiring discovery, pleasure and self-expression through unique and high-quality consumption experiences

motivations.tr-1: For me, smart shopping means finding the best value without compromising on what I need. I plan my purchases, compare prices, and feel the quiet satisfaction of spending well. Every good deal feels like a small victory. #SmartShopper #ValueFirst #BudgetWin #PlanAhead #SpendWell
motivations.tr-2: For me, shopping is about providing the best for my family every single day. Bulk packs and value formats mean I can feed everyone well without the stress. Seeing my family happy at the table is worth everything. #FamilyFirst #BulkBuy #FeedTheCrowd #HomeHero #BigCartEnergy
motivations.tr-3: For me, the thrill is in the deal. I check the weekly offers, collect loyalty points and never miss a great promotion. Getting something at a great price feels like winning — and I love to win. #DealHunter #PointsCollector #NeverPayFull #PromoKing #CashbackLife
motivations.tr-4: For me, what I consume matters. I choose organic, natural and free-from products because my health and my family's wellbeing are non-negotiable. Clean labels give me peace of mind. #CleanEating #OrganicFirst #HealthConscious #LabelReader #WellnessFirst
motivations.tr-5: For me, quality is everything. I seek out artisanal, fresh and premium products that elevate my everyday meals. Good food is not a luxury — it's how I show love for myself and the people I care about. #FoodLover #QualityFirst #ArtisanalLife #FreshIsBest #EatWell
motivations.tr-6: For me, convenience is king. I want products that are ready fast, easy to store, and help me get dinner on the table without the stress. Life is busy — my groceries should keep up. #QuickAndEasy #NoFussFood #TimeIsMoney #GrabAndGo #EfficientLiving
motivations.tr-7: For me, every purchase is a vote for the planet. I choose sustainable, locally sourced and eco-certified products because doing good and living well are not mutually exclusive. My trolley is my manifesto. #ConsciousConsumer #EcoFirst #ShopResponsibly #ZeroWaste #GreenBasket
motivations.tr-8: For me, trust is everything. I go back to brands that consistently deliver what they promise. Certifications, clear labels and always being in stock matter more than trends or packaging. #TrustedBrands #ReliableFirst #AlwaysInStock #SafeChoice #ConsistencyWins
motivations.tr-9: For me, shopping is my moment of indulgence. Those little treats and premium picks are how I reward myself for a busy week. I deserve to enjoy something special, and the right product makes all the difference. #TreatYourself #LittleLuxury #SelfReward #YouDeserveIt #SmallIndulgence
motivations.tr-10: For me, shopping is an adventure. I love discovering unique, international and specialty products that tell a story and open up entirely new experiences. My trolley is a passport to the world. #FoodExplorer #WorldFlavors #DiscoverNew #SpecialtyFinds #CulinaryAdventure
